steps.title: Fit the line from the table
steps.content: For a table-to-equation question, enter two table points and run a linear regression. The table includes $(0,95)$ and $(1,105)$, so use $y_1 \sim m x_1+b$ in Desmos.

steps.title: Read the equation
steps.content: Desmos gives $m=10$ and $b=95$, so the relationship is $y=10x+95$. This also matches the table because increasing $x$ by $1$ increases $y$ by $10$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is $y=10x+95$, so A is correct.
